title: WorkItemRef
description: Canonical reference to a unit of work emitted by a work-source (forge issue/PR, scheduled job, manual trigger) and consumed by pipelines. Forge-specific fields (forge_host, owner, repo, number) are required only when source identifies a git forge; schedule/manual sources omit them.

source.description: Origin of the work item. Forge values (github, gitea, gitlab, bitbucket) imply forge_host, owner, repo are required.

forge_host.description: Hostname of the forge instance (e.g. github.com, codeberg.org, gitlab.example.com). Required for forge sources.

owner.description: Owner (user or organization). Required for forge sources.

repo.description: Repository name. Required for forge sources.

number.description: Issue or PR number. Optional even for forge sources because some forges expose numberless work items (e.g. Gitea task lists).

url.description: Canonical URL identifying the work item. Used as the primary key in the worksource_binding table.

title.description: Human-readable title of the work item.

labels.description: Labels or tags attached to the work item. May be empty; absent for sources that have no label concept.

state.description: Lifecycle state. 'merged' applies only to PR-like work items; consumers may filter per source.

created_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp marking when the work item was created.
